lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: so jan niramal jin aap pachhaataa |
lines.english: That humble being is immaculate, who knows his own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਅਮਰੁ ਏਕਾ ਪਤਿਸਾਹੀ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਰ ਬਣਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eko amar ekaa patisaahee jug jug sir kaar banaaee he |1|
lines.english: There is only One Command, and there is only One Supreme King. In each and every age, He links each to their tasks. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੀ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rasanaa sabad ratee gun gaavai dar saachai pat paaee he |2|
lines.english: His tongue is imbued with the Shabad, and he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord; he is honored in the Court of the True Lord. ||2||
The Lord, the Giver of peace, Himself comes and meets him.
The self-willed manmukh, the slanderer, loses his honor.
The Gurmukh is blessed with the glorious greatness of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਪਰਮ ਹੰਸ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam rate param hans bairaagee nij ghar taarree laaee he |3|
lines.english: Attuned to the Naam, the supreme soul-swans remain detached; in the home of the self, they remain absorbed in deep meditative trance. ||3||
That humble being who dies in the Shabad is perfect.
The brave, heroic True Guru chants and proclaims this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਜਲਤੇ ਕੀ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ghar jalate kee khabar na paae |
lines.english: but he does not realize that his own home is on fire.
The Pandit, the religious scholar, reads and instructs others,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨੁ ਪੀਵੈ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa andar amrit sar saachaa man peevai bhaae subhaaee he |4|
lines.english: Deep within the body is the true pool of Ambrosial Nectar; the mind drinks it in with loving devotion. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਪੜਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve naam na paaeeai parr thaake saant na aaee he |5|
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, the Naam is not obtained. You can read until you are exhausted, but you shall not find peace and tranquility. ||5||
Some smear their bodies with ashes, and wander around in religious disguises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਲਤ ਰਹਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੇਖਿ ਭਰਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anadin jalat raheh din raatee bharam bhekh bharamaaee he |6|
lines.english: Night and day, they continue burning, day and night; they are deluded and confused by their doubt and religious costumes. ||6||
Without the Word of the Shabad, who has ever subdued egotism?
They die in the Shabad, and dwell in the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਮਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਉਦਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik grih kuttanb meh sadaa udaasee |
lines.english: Some, in the midst of their household and family, remain always unattached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਹਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa raheh rang raate bhai bhaae bhagat chit laaee he |7|
lines.english: Night and day, they remain forever attuned to His Love; they focus their consciousness on loving devotion and the Fear of God. ||7||
The self-willed manmukh indulges in slander, and is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jamakaal tis kade na chhoddai ant geaa pachhutaaee he |8|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death never leaves him, and in the end, he leaves, regretting and repenting. ||8||
Through the True Word of the Shabad, true honor is obtained.
The dog of greed barks within him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai mukat na paavai koee |
lines.english: Without the Name, no one attains liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੋ ਨਾਉ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਐਸੀ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bin satigur ko naau na paae prabh aisee banat banaaee he |9|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one finds the Name. Such is the making which God has made. ||9||
Some remain imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Formless Lord, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਇ ਭਉ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jis no aap milaae so boojhai bhagat bhaae bhau jaaee he |10|
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord unites with Himself; through loving devotional worship, fear is dispelled. ||10||
Some are Siddhas and seekers, and great contemplators.
Some take cleansing baths and give donations to charities, but they do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਨੈ ਸਿਉ ਲੂਝਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik manooaa maar manai siau loojheh |
lines.english: Some struggle with their minds, and conquer and subdue their minds.
He Himself creates and bestows glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਇਕ ਰੰਗੀ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: saachai sabad rate ik rangee saachai sabad milaaee he |11|
lines.english: Some are imbued with love for the True Word of the Shabad; they merge with the True Shabad. ||11||
By the Pleasure of His Will, He bestows union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮੇਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਇਉ ਫੁਰਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: aape nadar kare man vasiaa merai prabh iau furamaaee he |12|
lines.english: Bestowing His Grace, He comes to dwell in the mind; such is the Command ordained by my God. ||12||
The false, self-willed manmukhs do not know how to serve the Guru.
Those humble beings who serve the True Guru are true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: aape karataa kar kar vekhai jiau bhaavai tiau laaee he |13|
lines.english: The Creator Himself creates the creation and watches over it; he attaches all according to the Pleasure of His Will. ||13||
Through perfect destiny, one realizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
In each and every age, the True Lord is the one and only Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਦਰੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: sabad mile se vichhurre naahee nadaree sehaj milaaee he |14|
lines.english: Those who are immersed in the Shabad are not separated again. By His Grace, they are intuitively immersed in the Lord. ||14||
Acting in egotism, they are stained with the filth of Maya.
They die and die again, only to be reborn in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਮਨਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve mukat na hoee man dekhahu liv laaee he |15|
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, no one finds liberation. O mind, tune into this, and see. ||15||
